PowerBI_Assistive_Text_ContextMenu: For context (right-click) events, display Power BI's context menu. If disabled, Power BI's context menu will not be invoked, but any Vega event streams you have set up will still work as intended.
PowerBI_Assistive_Text_ContextMenuSelect: If the Power BI context menu is enabled, Deneb will attempt to resolve data points over any marks that are a target of the event and display context-specific actions, such as drillthrough, if they are set up in your report.
PowerBI_Assistive_Text_Highlight: Instruct Deneb to provide both original and contextual (highlight) values for eligible measures.
PowerBI_Assistive_Text_Interactivity: Please note that interactivity options may require further configuration via your specification once enabled.
PowerBI_Assistive_Text_Selection: Add support fields to the dataset that will allow Deneb to supply cross-filter state and allow you to provide functionality around this state.
PowerBI_Assistive_Text_SelectionMode: Specify how Deneb should attempt to process cross-filter events.
PowerBI_Assistive_Text_Tooltip: If enabled, this will use Deneb's integration with Power BI tooltip APIs and attempt to resolve report page tooltips, if they are set up. If disabled, any tooltips will be displayed using Vega's tooltip handler.
PowerBI_Text_Warning_Invalid_Cross_Filte: The first parameter must be a valid `event` from the Vega view.
The second parameter must be a valid filter expression.
[pbiCrossFilter] expression functions are valid only for Advanced cross-filtering management mode. Please refer to the documentation for more information.
`options` must be a valid object, and contain valid property values. Refer to the documentation for more information.
[pbiCrossFilterApply] We were not able to cross-filter data based on your supplied parameters.
PowerBI_Fetching_Data_Assistive_01_Prefi: You're seeing this section because you've enabled the
PowerBI_Fetching_Data_Assistive_01_Suffi: property. There are some important things to note if you're intending to use this in your reports. The following events will trigger a reload, which may affect performance and make editing more cumbersome:
PowerBI_Fetching_Data_Assistive_02_Point: Adding/removing columns & measures, and slicing data into the visual.
PowerBI_Fetching_Data_Assistive_02_Suffi: As such, you may wish to disable this property if you're doing a lot of editing and then re-enable when ready to test and publish.
PowerBI_Fetching_Data_Assistive_03_Prefi: You can prevent this message being displayed for your end-users by turning off the
PowerBI_Fetching_Data_Progress_Suffix: row(s) loaded from data model so far...
PowerBI_Landing_Add_Data_Body: Add the columns and/or measures you wish to visualize to the Values data role. You can add as many as you wish, in order to achieve the desired 'shape' of your dataset.
PowerBI_Landing_Add_Data_Subtitle: At least one column or measure in your visual's dataset is needed for Deneb to function.
PowerBI_Landing_Create_Visual_Body: You can import a template, or start with a blank design and build iteratively using your preferred language. You can also add interactivity features to facilitate cross-filtering or highlighting, tooltips and drillthrough.
PowerBI_Landing_Create_Visual_Subtitle: Click [...] on the visual header, then 'Edit' to open the advanced editor.
PowerBI_Landing_Experience_Visual_Body: When you've finished, you can save your changes, and also export a template of your work to share with others, or add to source control. Return to the report to view and test your design.
PowerBI_Landing_Resources_Deneb: Read the detailed documentation and see community examples
PowerBI_Objects_Vega_EnableContextMenuSe: Attempt to resolve data point-specific actions
PowerBI_Objects_Vega_EnableSelection: Expose cross-filtering values for dataset rows
PowerBI_Radio_Button_Description_Cross_F: I will manage cross-filtering myself in my specification (available for Vega only).
Let Deneb attempt to resolve cross-filtering for me.
PowerBI_Toast_Body_Unapplied_Changes: These will be lost if you leave the page without applying them.
PowerBI_Toast_Subtitle_Cross_Filter_Limi: Clear your selection to try again.
PowerBI_Vega_Loader_Warning_HoverText: Remote resources cannot be loaded in the AppSource version.
PowerBI_Vega_Loader_Warning_DetailedText: Due to certification requirements, the AppSource version of Deneb does not permit loading from external URLs. This can be done with the standalone version, available from Deneb's GitHub repository. You can learn more about the standalone version on the Getting Started page on Deneb's website (https://deneb.guide/getting-started#standalone-version).
